subcodes.first_line: We desire to mention him who hath set his face towards Us and to let him once again drink deep from the life-giving waters
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر من اقبل الینا و نسقیه کوثر العنایه مره بعد مره لیقربه الی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @presence of; reunion with God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort
